name: cyber-forge-ai-platform
description: 🛡️ Advanced Real-Time Cybersecurity Platform with AI-Powered Threat Detection | Cross-platform desktop application featuring intelligent security monitoring, machine learning-based threat analysis, and agentic AI assistant | Built with Electron, React, TensorFlow, and LangChain | Comprehensive security analytics, real-time threat intelligence, and automated incident response capabilities

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:desktop && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:landing && npm run install:backend && npm run install:ml
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:landing"
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:mobile: cd mobile-app && npm run build:android && npm run build:ios
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:ml
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:landing
scripts.clean: npm run clean:deps && npm run clean:builds
scripts.clean:builds: find . -name 'build' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +

author: Haggai-dev665
